message.content: How do I set up a Go project with sqlite-vec?
You need to install the sqlite-vec Go bindings. First add the dependency with go get, then import the cgo package and call vec.Auto() in an init function.
Define an Embedder interface with Embed(docs []string) and Dimension() methods. This lets you swap implementations without changing the palace code.
Can I use a fake embedder for testing?
Yes, create a FakeEmbedder that returns deterministic vectors. This keeps tests fast and hermetic without needing a real model.
